creator: bbp2006@columbia.edu
text:
On 3/31/2009 8:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/p5-Net-HL7,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/133258 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133258
> 

Approved (Is there a more direct way of doing this? I submitted the 
patch, it would be odd if I didn't approve... Cheers)


-- 
Brent B. Powers
Manager, Information Technology
Dept of Pathology
Columbia University
